channel.title: NAR Halsey, D Priftakis, S Mackenzie, S Wan, LM Davis, D Lilburn, A Thornton, N Papathanasiou, G Gnanasegaran, J Bomanji | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAR Halsey, D Priftakis, S Mackenzie, S Wan, LM Davis, D Lilburn, A Thornton, N Papathanasiou, G Gnanasegaran, J Bomanji

item.title: COVID-19 in the act: incidental 18F-FDG PET/CT findings in asymptomatic patients and those with symptoms not primarily correlated with COVID-19 during the United Kingdom coronavirus lockdown.
